task: M44 D8 T3 wire-up fix — wire writeSpawnPlan into 3 chokepoints + integration tests
body:
Fix M44 D8 T3 — the original commit 83a8227 was tagged with that ID but the diff did NOT touch the 3 chokepoint files. As a result, .gsd-t/spawns/ never gets populated and the right-panel Spawn Plan is permanently empty.

WORK TO DO:

1. Wire writeSpawnPlan into 3 chokepoints (do NOT change writer/derive/endpoint/UI — those are fine):

   a. bin/gsd-t-token-capture.cjs::captureSpawn — after the visible banner print and BEFORE await opts.spawnFn(), call writeSpawnPlan({ spawnId: opts.spawnId || makeSpawnId(opts.command), kind: 'in-session-subagent', milestone: opts.milestone, projectDir, currentIter: opts.iter }). Wrap in try/catch — never block the spawn. Then in the existing try/catch around spawnFn, after the row is recorded, call markSpawnEnded({ spawnId, endedReason: caught ? 'error' : 'completed', projectDir }). Add a small makeSpawnId helper that returns 's-' + crypto.randomBytes(4).toString('hex') if opts.spawnId is missing.

   b. bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs::autoSpawnHeadless — after writeSessionFile and writeContinueHereFile (line ~223) and before installCompletionWatcher, call writeSpawnPlan({ spawnId: id, kind: 'headless-detached', milestone: process.env.GSD_T_MILESTONE || null, projectDir, currentIter: process.env.GSD_T_ITER ? parseInt(process.env.GSD_T_ITER,10) : null }). Wrap in try/catch. The completion watcher already fires on child exit — extend it to call markSpawnEnded({ spawnId: id, endedReason: 'completed', projectDir }) when child exits cleanly. Find installCompletionWatcher in the same file.

   c. commands/gsd-t-resume.md Step 0 — under the GSD_T_UNATTENDED_WORKER=1 worker bypass branch (early in Step 0), add a one-time writeSpawnPlan call. The worker bypass section starts with: 'Worker bypass: If the environment variable GSD_T_UNATTENDED_WORKER=1 is set...'. Add a bash block right after that paragraph that runs:
      node -e "const w = require('./bin/spawn-plan-writer.cjs'); try { w.writeSpawnPlan({ spawnId: process.env.GSD_T_SPAWN_ID || ('iter-' + Date.now()), kind: 'unattended-worker', milestone: process.env.GSD_T_MILESTONE, projectDir: '.', currentIter: parseInt(process.env.GSD_T_ITER||'0',10) }); } catch(e) { process.stderr.write('[spawn-plan] '+e.message+'\n'); }"
   And in bin/gsd-t-unattended.cjs where it spawns the worker, set GSD_T_SPAWN_ID, GSD_T_ITER, GSD_T_MILESTONE in the worker env so the resume worker can identify itself.

2. Integration test test/m44-d8-t3-wire-up.test.js — three test cases that would have caught this regression:
   - 'captureSpawn writes a spawn-plan file at .gsd-t/spawns/{spawnId}.json' — tmp dir, mock spawnFn returns {usage}, assert file exists with correct shape after captureSpawn returns
   - 'autoSpawnHeadless writes a spawn-plan file' — tmp dir, mock spawn (skip the actual child by checking the file gets written before child.unref); assert .gsd-t/spawns/{id}.json exists with kind='headless-detached'
   - 'spawn-plan endedAt is non-null after captureSpawn completes' — verify markSpawnEnded ran

3. Pre-commit gate:
   - Run npm test — must pass
   - Doc ripple: progress.md Decision Log entry citing the bug + fix, .gsd-t/contracts/spawn-plan-contract.md add a 'Wire-up integration test required' note in §Test Requirements

4. Commit with message:
   [quick] fix M44 D8 T3 — wire writeSpawnPlan into 3 chokepoints (regression fix)

   Original commit 83a8227 was tagged [M44-D8-T3] but only contained
   unrelated orchestrator-config cleanup; the 3 chokepoint files were
   never touched. As a result .gsd-t/spawns/ stays empty and the
   right-panel Spawn Plan visualization renders empty during real spawns.

   Fix: implement the wire-up in captureSpawn, autoSpawnHeadless, and
   gsd-t-resume.md worker bypass. Add integration tests that assert
   spawn-plan files appear on disk after each chokepoint call — these
   tests would have caught the original regression.

CONSTRAINTS:
- Wire-up must NEVER block the spawn (try/catch every writeSpawnPlan call).
- Do NOT modify any in-flight M45 D1/D2 work (scripts/gsd-t-transcript.html, scripts/gsd-t-dashboard-server.js, scripts/gsd-t-context-meter.js, .gsd-t/transcripts/*).
- Do NOT modify the writer module itself — only the 3 callers.
- Keep diffs minimal — this is a regression fix, not a refactor.

Read CLAUDE.md and .gsd-t/progress.md first, then start at Step 1 of /gsd-t-quick (skip Step 0 — you are the spawned subagent).
